name: Apple Kuchen #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the margarine into the cake mix until crumbly.
2. Mix in the shredded coconut.
3. Pat the mixture lightly into an ungreased 13x9-inch pan, building up edges slightly.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
5. Arrange the sliced apples on the warm crust.
6. Mix together the sugar and cinnamon and sprinkle over the apples.
7. Mix the sour cream and beaten egg together well.
8. Drizzle the mixture over the apple and cinnamon layers.
9. Return to the oven and bake at 350°F for an additional 20 minutes, or until lightly browned. Makes 1 13x9-inch cake.
